provenance.source_corpus: Natural revegetation of two block-cut mined peatlands in eastern Canada

nodes.name: Natural blockage of ditches due to cessation of maintenance

source_spans.text: Natural blockage of ditches due to cessation of maintenance may have favored water recharge of the residual peat in the trenches

nodes.name: Water recharge of the residual peat in the trenches

source_spans.text: Natural blockage of ditches due to cessation of maintenance may have favored water recharge of the residual peat in the trenches

nodes.name: Small rough patches resulting from cutting work

source_spans.text: Small rough patches resulting from cutting work may also have enhanced chances of direct Sphagnum re-establishment on the residual peat

nodes.name: Chances of direct Sphagnum re-establishment on the residual peat

source_spans.text: Small rough patches resulting from cutting work may also have enhanced chances of direct Sphagnum re-establishment on the residual peat

A partially reconstituted acrotelm attenuates the hydrological deficiency, keeps water in reserve, and limits the oscillations of the water table, thereby ensuring favorable hydrological conditions for Sphagnum growth

nodes.name: Favorable hydrological conditions for Sphagnum growth

source_spans.text: A partially reconstituted acrotelm attenuates the hydrological deficiency, keeps water in reserve, and limits the oscillations of the water table, thereby ensuring favorable hydrological conditions for Sphagnum growth
Thus, the high water table at both sites may also be attributed to the progressive reconstitution of the acrotelm.

nodes.name: High water table at both sites

source_spans.text: Thus, the high water table at both sites may also be attributed to the progressive reconstitution of the acrotelm.

nodes.name: Establishment of small cushions of Sphagnum

source_spans.text: Establishment of small cushions of Sphagnum can initiate formation of new fibric peat accumulation.

nodes.name: Formation of new fibric peat accumulation

source_spans.text: Establishment of small cushions of Sphagnum can initiate formation of new fibric peat accumulation.

nodes.name: Expansion of Sphagnum cushions under ericaceous shrubs

source_spans.text: a sufficient expansion of Sphagnum cushions under ericaceous shrubs led to a complete overgrowth of Eriophorum spissum tussocks and partial overgrowth of Polytrichum strictum mats.

nodes.name: Overgrowth of Eriophorum spissum tussocks and Polytrichum strictum mats

source_spans.text: a sufficient expansion of Sphagnum cushions under ericaceous shrubs led to a complete overgrowth of Eriophorum spissum tussocks and partial overgrowth of Polytrichum strictum mats.

Complete Sphagnum re-establishment on the lower, lateral parts of the trenches reveals that topography and high water table have more impact on the development of a Sphagnum cover than time since abandonment of exploitation.

Complete Sphagnum re-establishment on the lower, lateral parts of the trenches reveals that topography and high water table have more impact on the development of a Sphagnum cover than time since abandonment of exploitation.
The companion species may then have generated some local microclimatic conditions of moisture and shading, protecting Sphagnum from desiccation by wind at the initial revegetation stage

nodes.name: Local microclimatic conditions of moisture and shading

source_spans.text: The companion species may then have generated some local microclimatic conditions of moisture and shading, protecting Sphagnum from desiccation by wind at the initial revegetation stage

Vegetation succession towards formation of hummocks and lawns, even when succession was initiated in Polytrichum strictum mats or in proximity to Eriophorum spissum tussocks, confirms the ability of Sphagnum to direct succession if it successfully colonizes a habitat
